label: Change Control
desc: Manages and tracks system or project changes

label: Approval
desc: Gate that approves changes before production release

label: Code Change
desc: Defines infra and config changes using Bicep and Ansible with DEV/PROD parameters so the same code is used for both environments

label: Code Testing
desc: Validates changes before deployment

label: GitHub/AzureDevops
desc: Version control system for storing code and files with workflows for bicep (build) and ansible (config)

label: Bicep Build
desc: CI\CD workflow that builds and deploys Bicep from main branch

label: Ansible Build
desc: CI\CD workflow that runs Ansible from main branch updates

label: Azure Cloud Resources
desc: Azure-hosted infrastructure resources

label: Azure Arc
desc: Extends Azure management to hybrid and on-prem environments

label: Azure HCI
desc: Hyperconverged infrastructure platform

label: OnPrem Resources
desc: On-site infrastructure systems

label: Azure Monitor/Alert
desc: Collects and analyzes logs,metrics and triggers alerts

label: Azure Sentinel
desc: Cloud SIEM for threat detection and security monitoring

label: Azure Policy
desc: Enforces compliance rules across Azure resources

label: Defender for Cloud
desc: Provides security posture management and vulnerability detection

label: Success
desc: Indicates successful deployment and updates change control

label: Failure
desc: Triggers rollback and failure handling workflow

label: Investigation/Fix/deploy
desc: Failure triggers a rollback and investigation to diagnose issues. If a fix is required

label: Mark Change as completed
desc: Closes the change request

label: Grafana Dashboard
desc: Visualizes metrics and monitoring data
